CVE-2018-10756.title: Use-after-free in libtransmission/variant.c in Transmission befor ...
CVE-2018-10756.description: Use-after-free in libtransmission/variant.c in Transmission before 3.00 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) or possibly execute arbitrary code via a crafted torrent file.
